'''Z'meer Bothu''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] serving the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]], Z'meer Bothu was [[Jedi training/Legends|educated]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]. Bothu held the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]], and when the conflict between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] erupted into the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Master Bothu stayed at the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. [[20 BBY/Legends|Twenty four months]] after the war began she accepted the responsibility of training the [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] of Master [[T'chooka D'oon]], the young [[Flynn Kybo]]. Encouraging him to calm his rebellious nature and his thirst for vengeance against his Master's murderer, [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]], Bothu and Kybo spent hours deep in meditation within the Temple's expansive rooftop gardens.<ref name="Grievous 1">[[General Grievous 1|''General Grievous'' 1]]</ref>

Soon, however, while Bothu was deep in a trance, Master [[B'dard Tone]] approached Kybo and offered him a place on his unsanctioned mission to [[Assassin/Legends|assassinate]] Grievous. Agreeing to Tone's offer, Kybo was surprised to find that Bothu had overheard the entire conversation and his plan. Reminding the young Human that she was meditating, not asleep, Bothu stated she would not inform the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] of his plan; similarly, she would not come to his defense should the mission be a failure and the Council wish to expel him. Departing the Temple together aboard a cruiser carrying several Jedi to the [[Battle of Alderaan (Clone Wars)|battle]] on [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]], Bothu turned a blind eye as her Padawan stole a small ship from the hangar bay, effectively severing his ties with the Jedi Order.<ref name="Grievous 1" />

==Personality and traits==
Bothu possessed distinctive facial markings, including a bow-shaped ribbon mark<ref name="TCSWE" /> and a lip marking.<ref name="Grievous 1" />

==Appearances==
*[[General Grievous 1|''General Grievous'' 1]] {{1st}}
